things.name: Legoland Billund
things.description: Original LEGO theme park with Miniland, rides and LEGO builds for all ages

things.name: LEGO House
things.description: Home of the LEGO Brick - an architectural masterpiece with interactive LEGO experiences

things.name: Givskud Zoo (Lion Park)
things.description: Drive-through safari park with lions, giraffes and white rhinos

things.name: Jelling Monuments
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage Viking royal burial mounds and runic stones of Harald Bluetooth

things.name: Vejle Art Museum
things.description: Contemporary art museum overlooking the Vejle Fjord nearby

things.name: Sculpture Park Billund
things.description: Outdoor sculpture park celebrating Danish and international contemporary art

things.name: Grindsted Museum
things.description: Local history museum in the nearby town with exhibits on the region

things.name: Randbøl Heath
things.description: Wild heathland nature reserve with orchids, deer and ancient burial mounds

things.name: LEGO Factory Tour
things.description: Behind-the-scenes look at LEGO production in the world's largest LEGO factory

things.name: Vejle Fjord
things.description: Beautiful narrow fjord with hiking trails and the famous Viking ship Ravningbroen bridge
